name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the TV accessory in Apple Home.

hubIP.title: Hub IP Address
hubIP.description: IP address of the Sofabaton X2 hub. Leave blank to use mDNS auto-discovery.

hubMac.title: Hub MAC Address
hubMac.description: MAC address of the Sofabaton X2 hub (used for MQTT topics). Leave blank to auto-detect.

mainActivity.title: Main Activity
mainActivity.description: Activity to launch when the TV is powered on from Apple Home.

activities.title: Activities (Fallback)
activities.description: Optional. Activity names are auto-discovered from the hub at startup. Only fill this in as a fallback if auto-discovery fails.

remoteOverrideCommandsList.title: Remote Key Overrides

command.title: Sofabaton Command
command.description: MQTT command string to send (e.g. cursor_up, volume_up, play_pause)

remoteOverrideCommandsList.description: Override the default command sent for a HomeKit remote button press.
